phrases.intent_en: Ask if you need a reservation for the restaurant
phrases.cultural_note: Maison Kammerzell is one of the most famous restaurants in Strasbourg. Reservations are recommended, especially for dinner.

responses.english: Yes, especially in the evening. Book online or by phone.
responses.phonetic: wee, soor-TOO luh SWAHR. ray-zair-VAY ahn LEEN-yuh oo par tay-lay-FOHN
responses.local: Oui, surtout le soir. Réservez en ligne ou par téléphone.

phrases.text_local: Quelles sont les spécialités du restaurant ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel son lay spay-see-ah-lee-TAY doo res-to-RAN
phrases.cultural_note: The restaurant serves traditional Alsatian dishes like choucroute and baeckeoffe.

responses.english: Choucroute and baeckeoffe are the specialties.
responses.phonetic: lah shoo-KROOT ay luh BEK-oh-fuh son lay spay-see-ah-lee-TAY
responses.local: La choucroute et le baeckeoffe sont les spécialités.

phrases.cultural_note: Yes, it's one of Strasbourg's most famous restaurants. Book ahead, especially in the evening. It serves traditional Alsatian cuisine.

responses.english: Yes, a very famous Alsatian restaurant. You need to book.
responses.local: Oui, un restaurant alsacien très connu. Il faut réserver.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the best photo angle
phrases.text_local: Quel est le meilleur angle pour la photo ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eh leh may-YUHR an-gluh poor lah foh-TOH
phrases.cultural_note: The best view is from across the square. At sunset, the half-timbered facade is especially photogenic.

responses.english: From the Cathedral Square, across the way.
responses.phonetic: wee, luh swar say tray zho-LEE
responses.local: Depuis la place de la Cathédrale, en face.
